details: The agent ran kubectl-axi commands against the cluster and correctly traced the full chain: pod db-5bfcfcd584-jcf6z is Pending/Unschedulable because it mounts PVC 'data-cache', which is Pending because its requested StorageClass 'fast-ssd' does not exist in the cluster (only 'standard' is available). The complete pod -> unbound PVC -> nonexistent StorageClass chain was identified with supporting evidence from cluster events.
